page_metadata.biotools__summary: NeoFox (NEOantigen Feature tOolboX) is a toolbox for annotating neoantigen candidates with neoantigen features. NeoFox annotates neoantigen candidate sequences with published neo-epitope descriptors.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NeoFox (NEOantigen Feature tOolboX) is a toolbox for annotating neoantigen candidates with neoantigen features. NeoFox annotates neoantigen candidate sequences with published neo-epitope descriptors.
